name: 父母輩的背叛與糾葛
description: 女主母親Lillian在女主父親抑鬱症嚴重時出軌男主父親Nate，導致女主父親死亡。這段父母輩的恩怨成為男女主感情最大的外部障礙，也為女主的堅強性格和對母親的怨恨提供了動機。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I just want to know why you cheated on Dad, which caused his death when you knew his depression was really severe. / She and Nate were the ones who made the mistake first. How dare she judge dad? / If it weren't for your husband, my father would not have died. The person you should hate the most should be Nate. It was his infidelity that led to this whole tragedy.
examples.context: 女主母親Lillian在女主父親抑鬱症嚴重時出軌男主父親Nate，導致女主父親死亡。這段父母輩的恩怨成為男女主感情最大的外部障礙，也為女主的堅強性格和對母親的怨恨提供了動機。
